politics.prompt: Which face does the White House think would be the 'no better addition' to a certain famous mountain of four presidents?
politics.summary: The White House said there would be 'no better addition' to Mount Rushmore than Donald Trump, who previously shared an image of his face on the monument.

politics.prompt: Iran is throwing a multi-day funeral for their late Supreme Leader—how did he leave this mortal coil?
options: He ascended to a higher plane of existence
He was defeated in a rap battle
He was killed in an airstrike at the start of a war
politics.summary: Iran began a dayslong funeral for Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was 86 and killed by an airstrike months earlier at the start of a war.

politics.prompt: Who did Donald Trump try to troll on her wedding night, only for her to party on like a boss?
politics.summary: Donald Trump tried to troll Taylor Swift on her wedding night, but she kept partying, with the White House Instagram feed appearing irked by the holiday wedding.

politics.prompt: What historical 'interpretation' is the Trump administration bringing back to George Washington's old pad?
politics.summary: The Trump administration's interpretation of slavery under George Washington can be reinstalled, replacing panels from 2010 that detailed the lives of nine slaves in the President's House.

politics.prompt: Nintendo is talking to The Pokémon Company about a problem even printing 10 billion cards last year couldn't fix—what is it?
politics.summary: Nintendo's president addressed widespread Pokémon card scalping, which fans feel is worse than ever despite 10 billion cards being printed last year.

business.prompt: Who tied the knot this week in a ceremony so star-studded, even the officiant was a funnyman?
options: Jayson Tatum and a championship ring
business.summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were married in a ceremony officiated by Adam Sandler at Madison Square Garden.

business.prompt: What record will a family-owned company smash this Fourth of July, making other fireworks jealous?
options: Most fireworks launched from a backyard grill
Largest display of sparklers in a single hand
business.summary: A family-owned company plans to set off 850,000 fireworks in Washington, D.C., for the largest display in history.

business.prompt: Which basketball star made a statement after his team traded his longtime sidekick?
business.summary: Jayson Tatum released a statement after the Celtics traded Jaylen Brown.

business.prompt: Pabst Blue Ribbon is celebrating America's 250th birthday with a beer pack so massive, it might need its own zip code. What's the size?
business.summary: Pabst Blue Ribbon released a limited-edition 250-ounce Freedom Pack for America's 250th anniversary.

business.prompt: Which beloved California brewery is bringing back its iconic label after a failed 'woke' rebrand?
business.summary: Anchor Brewing Company received federal approval to revive its original illustrated labels for Anchor Steam Beer and Old Foghorn ale.

tech.prompt: What did Ukrainian drones reportedly do to St. Petersburg early on July 4?
options: Delivered a pizza to the Kremlin
Took a selfie with Putin's cat
Sprayed 'Happy Birthday' graffiti on a bridge
tech.summary: Ukrainian drones reportedly struck an oil terminal in St. Petersburg, according to Russian Telegram media channels.

tech.prompt: Who did Brad Paisley and Kimberly Williams-Paisley thank for an 'amazing donation' ahead of their wedding?
options: Dolly Parton and a passing moose
Elon Musk and a sentient robot
tech.summary: Brad Paisley and Kimberly Williams-Paisley thanked Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce for their 'amazing donation' ahead of the couple's wedding.

tech.prompt: Why did Philly cancel its 250th parade, leaving tourists from as far as Italy heartbroken?
options: A giant cheesesteak rolled into town
A sudden invasion of rogue pigeons
tech.summary: Extreme heat forced Philadelphia to cancel its 250th parade, disappointing thousands of participants who traveled from as far away as Italy.

tech.prompt: Who did the Vatican declare in schism and excommunicate this week?
options: A group of rogue nuns with a podcast
The Society of St. Pius X
Vatican's own kitchen staff for serving cold pasta
tech.summary: The Vatican's doctrine office declared the ultra-traditionalist Society of St. Pius X in schism and excommunicated its bishops and priests.

tech.prompt: What big move did Flyers GM Danny Brière make to land a star center?
options: Offered a lifetime supply of pretzels
Tendered an offer sheet to Ducks center Leo Carlsson
Traded a hockey puck for a unicorn
Challenged the Ducks to a dance-off
tech.summary: Flyers GM Danny Brière took a huge gamble by tendering an offer sheet to Anaheim Ducks center Leo Carlsson in hopes of landing a star.

sports.prompt: Which tiny island nation made Lionel Messi sweat like a nervous penguin before finally waving goodbye in the World Cup?
sports.summary: Cabo Verde's 'Blue Sharks' pushed Argentina and Messi to the limit in an emotional round of 32 match at the World Cup.

sports.prompt: Who dedicated a World Cup victory to Palestine, turning a football match into a political rally?
sports.summary: Egypt's coach dedicated their World Cup win to Palestine, with Arab fans including Gaza residents celebrating amid bombed buildings.

sports.prompt: What is the name of the new 35-hour scenario for the Danganronpa 2x2 game that got delayed until 2027?
sports.summary: Danganronpa 2x2 revealed its new 'Slayhem' scenario, clocking in at about 35 hours, but delayed it to early 2027.

sports.prompt: Why can't Destiny 2's developers fix the ridiculously overpowered armor set players just found?
options: Because Bungie is closing down Destiny 2 updates
Because players refuse to hand it over
Because the patch notes got eaten by a dog
Because the armor was a prank
sports.summary: Destiny 2 players discovered a hugely overpowered armor set, but Bungie can't patch it before the game stops getting updates.

sports.prompt: Which eerie video game outsold every single PS5 title on the PlayStation Store last month, and what do we blame?
options: A Backrooms game, thanks to the movie
A horror walking sim, thanks to a Steam sale
A liminal space simulator, thanks to a viral meme
A Five Nights at Freddy's clone, thanks to a TikTok trend
sports.summary: A Backrooms game outsold every PS5 title on the PS Store last month, largely driven by the release of a related movie.

general.prompt: America's about to blow out 250 candles! We asked folks what they think of their country on its semiquincentennial. What's the fancy term for that birthday again?
general.summary: NPR reporters across the U.S. asked citizens their thoughts on the nation's semiquincentennial.

general.prompt: Colorado's on fire! Literally! Thousands are fleeing as the Aspen Acres Fire spreads. How many wildfires are currently blazing across the western U.S.?
general.summary: The Aspen Acres Fire in Colorado destroyed homes and forced evacuations, part of about 40 wildfires across the western U.S.

general.prompt: Square Enix just dropped the mother of all sales! They're slashing prices on Final Fantasy, Dragon Quest, and more. What consoles are they targeting?
general.summary: Square Enix launched a massive sale on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch games, including heavy discounts on Final Fantasy and Dragon Quest.

general.prompt: Ferrari finally brought back the manual! Kind of. What's the name of this new special trim that lets you shift your own gears?
general.summary: The Ferrari 12Cilindri Manuale offers both manual and automatic driving modes.

general.prompt: Gear Patrol's rounding up watches for America's 250th. Which brands made the list of patriotic timepieces?
general.summary: The 10 best watches from Timex, Hamilton, Breitling, Zenith, and more celebrate America's 250th anniversary.

science.prompt: Which NASA telescope is falling back to Earth faster than a dropped burrito thanks to solar storms?
science.summary: Launched in 2004, the Swift telescope is sinking faster due to recent solar storms.

science.prompt: What Samsung device lineup just had its prices leaked like a bad rom-com script?
options: Galaxy Z Fold8, Fold8 Ultra, Flip8, Watch9, Watch Ultra 2
Galaxy Z Flip6, Fold6, Watch7, Watch Ultra
Galaxy Note20, Note20 Ultra, Watch Active 3
Galaxy S25, S25 Plus, S25 Ultra, Watch8
science.summary: Samsung's upcoming Galaxy Z Fold8, Fold8 Ultra, Flip8, Watch9, and Watch Ultra 2 prices have leaked ahead of their unveiling.

science.prompt: What's the size of Earth's new 'next-door neighbor' that might be habitable?
options: Approximately twice the size of Earth
Three times the size of Jupiter
science.summary: Astronomers discovered a potentially habitable exoplanet about twice the size of Earth.

science.prompt: What happened when physicists simulated a black hole in a lab?
science.summary: Physicists simulated a black hole in a lab, and it began to 'evaporate,' challenging common beliefs about black holes.

science.prompt: What did Galileo spot in 1610 that scientists now believe contains the largest ocean in the solar system?
options: A small, smooth moon circling Jupiter
science.summary: In 1610, Galileo observed a moon around Jupiter now thought to contain the largest ocean in the solar system under its icy surface.
